candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears within the cost of revenues/property costs block and thus looks like a component already embedded in the selected COGS bucket ('Property costs'). Adding it separately would risk double counting.
Generic operating D&A row, not specifically tied to COGS and positioned with broader operating expense lines rather than within the cost of revenues block.
Generic operating amortization row, not specifically tied to COGS and positioned with broader operating expense lines rather than within the cost of revenues block.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is 'Property costs'. The explicit 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues' line looks like a sub-component of that bucket rather than a separate same-level add-on, so no separate COGS_DA row should be added.

candidates.why: Appears as a separate operating expense line alongside SG&A-type rows such as Central Administration, Other External Costs, Goods for Resale, and Personnel Expenses. It does not look like a sub-component nested under the selected XSGA rows, so it should be added separately.

Appears as a separate operating expense line alongside SG&A-type rows and there is no broader D&A summary row visible for the SG&A bucket. It therefore looks like a separate add-on to the selected XSGA components.
Explicitly tied to cost of revenues, so it belongs to COGS rather than XSGA.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is a sum of component rows rather than a total SG&A line. The separate rows 'Depreciation of Fixed Assets' and 'Amortization of Intangibles' appear outside those selected components at the same operating level, so they should be added separately. No R&D row is selected and no SG&A D&A summary row is visible.
